title: Presto By Tower PT12076WHT Hand Blender/Stick Blender, Stainless Steel Blades, Two Speed Button, Turbo Button, 250W, White
features: POWERFUL BLENDING: 250W motor to create soups sauces and more with ease by blending firm ingredients
HIGH PERFORMANCE: Durable stainless steel blades for optimum performance over a long period of time
EASY GRIP: Ergonomic grip for easy use so you are in control of the blending action from start to finish
SIMPLY SWITCH ON/OFF: the Presto Hand Blender's two speed button operation means you can turn it on and off at the press of a button while handling as normal
2 YEAR GUARANTEE: Trusted Tower quality with a standard 1 year guarantee and a 1 year extension, subject to product registration online
description: From the manufacturer Our brand’s strength comes from its heritage – something that can’t be forged and something that allows us to continue offering highly desirable housewares products to a wide customer-base with unshakable brand loyalty. Quality, Innovation and Value Customers' Trusted Brand Healthy Cooking for Decades Desirable Electrical and Housewares Products Create fresh soups, smoothies, sauces and dips in minutes Easily create deliciously fresh soups, smoothies, sauces and dips with this Presto Hand Blender from Tower. Crafted with a 250W powerful motor it effortlessly blends a wide range of ingredients, including vegetables and fruit to create fresh foods and drinks for the whole family. Powerful 250W motor effortlessly blends the toughest ingredients DuraBlade steel blades give strength and durability for better results 2 speed settings including turbo function for fast and efficient results One-touch operation for convenient food preparation Item dimensions: H33.2 x W5.5 x D5.5cm ONE-TOUCH OPERATION A simple on/off button makes for convenient food preparation, with a turbo function for fast and efficient results ERGONOMIC HANDLE Provides a safe and comfortable grip for better control DURABLADE STEEL BLADES Ultra-long-lasting DuraBlade stainless steel blades give strength and durability for better results
